description: Combined Excel datasets. Each workbook is retained as a separate dataset.

rows.Caption: The biomedical untargeted urinary volatilome database (uBIOVOC DB).
Summary of the sample collection conditions used by the 34 analyzed studies.
Summary of the analytical conditions used by the 34 studies using them.
Summary of the GC-MS conditions used by the 34 analyzed studies.
Summary of the applications analyzed by the 34 analyzed studies.
The urinary volatilome database divided by biomedical appliations.

rows.Chemical name: benzene-1,2-dicarboxylic acid O2-hexan-3-yl ester O1-(2-methylpropyl) ester

rows.Sample manipulation: addition of protease inhibitors + at room temperature for 30min after pH modification
centrifugation 13000g for 10 min, filtered with membranes
thawed in water bath with stirrer at 60ºC overnight
centrifugation at 4C + protein precipitation by NaCl
Centrifuged 2916 x g for 20 min at 4C
filter with 0.2um membrane cellulose acetate filter

rows.Normalization: total area and Pareto scaling normalization
median normalization, transformed by cubic root and scaled

rows.Volume: 4 ml + 1 ml water in 20 ml vial
4ml urine + 1 ml water in 20 ml vial
20 ml in n.d. Vial in sampling bag
